How fast can you launch a website?

<div class=""elementor-element elementor-element-faq1d elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor"" data-id=""faq1d"" data-element_type=""widget"" data-e-type=""widget"" data-widget_type=""text-editor.default"">
Most small sites launch in 7–14 days once I have your content.  If you have a deadline or need something quicker, just let me know — I’m flexible.
<div class=""elementor-element elementor-element-faq2 e-con-full tmc-card reveal delay-5 e-flex e-con e-child"" data-id=""faq2"" data-element_type=""container"" data-e-type=""container"">

<div class=""elementor-element elementor-element-faq2d elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor"" data-id=""faq2d"" data-element_type=""widget"" data-e-type=""widget"" data-widget_type=""text-editor.default"">

<div class=""elementor-element elementor-element-faq3 e-con-full tmc-card reveal delay-3 e-flex e-con e-child"" data-id=""faq3"" data-element_type=""container"" data-e-type=""container"">

Yes — I take care of hosting, updates, backups, and security for you. With 30+ years in the IT industry, keeping things stable, fast, and protected is second nature.
Many clients pair this with ongoing visibility help through my flagship ADAP™ program so their site keeps improving month after month.

What you see is what you pay.

* Checks if two sets of Emoji characters render the same visually.
* This is used to determine if the browser is rendering an emoji with multiple data points
* correctly. set1 is the emoji in the correct form, using a zero-width joiner. set2 is the emoji
* in the incorrect form, using a zero-width space. If the two sets render the same, then the browser
* does not support the emoji correctly.
* This function may be serialized to run in a Worker. Therefore, it cannot refer to variables from the containing
* scope. Everything must be passed by parameters.
* @param {string} set1 Set of Emoji to test.
* @param {string} set2 Set of Emoji to test.
* @return {boolean} True if the two sets render the same.

* Checks if two sets of Emoji characters render the same visually.
